mapper.update: UPDATE iot_notify_channel SET name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled}, config_json = #{configJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_notify_channel SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_notify_channel WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM iot_notify_channel WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND channel_kind = #{channelKind} AND is_delete = 0
AND enabled = 1
ORDER BY id ASC
